task_completion.description: Verify that a dashboard named 'I/O Buffering Efficiency' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard title at the top of the Graphite UI reads 'I/O Buffering Efficiency'.

task_completion.description: Verify the graph 'Cumulative Network Ingest' applies the integral() function to the network bytes in metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Cumulative Network Ingest' is visible. Its legend or configuration panel shows 'integral(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the graph 'Network Ingress Rate (Bits)' applies the scale() function to multiply the network bytes in metric by 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Network Ingress Rate (Bits)' is visible. Its legend or configuration panel shows 'scale(servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in, 8)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the graph 'Write-to-Ingest Ratio' applies the divideSeries() function with disk writes as the numerator and network ingest as the denominator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Write-to-Ingest Ratio' is visible. Its legend or configuration panel shows 'divideSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes, servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the graph 'Robust Disk I/O' applies the movingMedian() function with a window size of 10 to the disk write bytes metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Robust Disk I/O' is visible. Its legend or configuration panel shows 'movingMedian(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes, 10)'.

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacts with the Graphite web interface to build the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Graphite UI, adding graphs, and applying functions via the interface menus.

integrity.description: Check that the graphs display actual plotted data lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs in the dashboard show rendered lines/curves representing the time-series data, confirming the metrics are correctly queried from the backend.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly writing the dashboard JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use a text editor or terminal to manually create or edit the /tmp/io_buffering_efficiency_dashboard_result.json file or Graphite's internal dashboard storage.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is 'I/O Buffering Efficiency'. The four expected graph titles are exactly: 'Cumulative Network Ingest', 'Network Ingress Rate (Bits)', 'Write-to-Ingest Ratio', and 'Robust Disk I/O'. The task operates on real AWS CloudWatch time-series data injected into Graphite.
